chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1959 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For order on MA No.10536/2025, 2. For hearing of bail application. 01.09.2025 Mr. Aghar Hussain Advocate. Ms. Rahat Ehsan, A.P.G. Sindh. ------------------------------- This is a protective bail. When it came up, Mr. Aghar Hussain Advocate submitted his vakalatnama on behalf of the applicant and a statement dated 01.09.2025 wherein it is stated that the applicant has surrendered before the trial Court and he attached a copy of order dated 19.08.2025 passed by the trial Court. Accordingly, this bail application has become infructuous and is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
